# GoodLinks CLI Command Reference

<!-- Generated by pnpm run skill:generate. Do not edit by hand. -->

Use installed leaf `--help` as the final authority if it differs from this file.

## `goodlinks`

Manage a local GoodLinks library from the command line

**Usage:** `goodlinks [options] [command]`

### Options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-V, --version` | output the version number |  |  |
| `--base-url <url>` | GoodLinks API base URL | `"http://localhost:9428/api/v1"` |  |
| `--token <token>` | GoodLinks API bearer token |  |  |

### Subcommands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `goodlinks links` | Read and manage links |
| `goodlinks lists` | List visible GoodLinks collections |
| `goodlinks tags` | List tags and tag usage |
| `goodlinks highlights` | Search and manage highlights |
| `goodlinks urls` | Show saved URL and domain statistics |
| `goodlinks tag-domain` | Tag links from one domain and its subdomains |
| `goodlinks dedupe` | Find or remove links with identical URLs |
| `goodlinks dead-links` | Find and tag links that are unavailable |
| `goodlinks auto-tag` | Tag untagged links using Claude and existing tags |
| `goodlinks untag` | Remove a tag from links matching a domain or search |
| `goodlinks retag` | Rename a tag across the collection |
| `goodlinks bulk-tag` | Apply tags from a YAML or JSON domain mapping |
| `goodlinks report` | Write a Markdown reading report |
| `goodlinks stale` | List unread links saved more than a given number of days ago |
| `goodlinks export` | Export the complete collection |
| `goodlinks visualize` | Generate visualization data and HTML |

## `goodlinks links`

Read and manage links

**Usage:** `goodlinks links [options] [command]`

### Inherited global options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-V, --version` | output the version number |  |  |
| `--base-url <url>` | GoodLinks API base URL | `"http://localhost:9428/api/v1"` |  |
| `--token <token>` | GoodLinks API bearer token |  |  |

### Subcommands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `goodlinks links get` | Get one link by ID |
| `goodlinks links get-url` | Get one link by its URL |
| `goodlinks links current` | Get the link currently selected in GoodLinks |
| `goodlinks links list` | Get links from a main GoodLinks list |
| `goodlinks links search` | Search links with filters and sorting |
| `goodlinks links content` | Get article content |
| `goodlinks links add` | Add a link or update the link with the same URL |
| `goodlinks links edit` | Edit link metadata |
| `goodlinks links delete` | Move one or more links to trash |

## `goodlinks links list`

Get links from a main GoodLinks list

**Usage:** `goodlinks links list [options] <list>`

### Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required | Variadic | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `<list>` |  | yes | no |  |  |

### Options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--search <text>` | Filter by title, summary, content, URL, or author |  |  |
| `--tag <tag>` | Filter by tag; repeat for multiple tags | `[]` |  |
| `--include-read` | Include read links where supported |  |  |
| `--limit <number>` | Maximum results, from 1 to 1000 |  |  |
| `--offset <number>` | Number of results to skip |  |  |

### Inherited global options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-V, --version` | output the version number |  |  |
| `--base-url <url>` | GoodLinks API base URL | `"http://localhost:9428/api/v1"` |  |
| `--token <token>` | GoodLinks API bearer token |  |  |

## `goodlinks links search`

Search links with filters and sorting

**Usage:** `goodlinks links search [options]`

### Options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--search <text>` | Filter by title, summary, content, URL, or author |  |  |
| `--tag <tag>` | Filter by tag; repeat for multiple tags | `[]` |  |
| `--include-read` | Include read links where supported |  |  |
| `--limit <number>` | Maximum results, from 1 to 1000 |  |  |
| `--offset <number>` | Number of results to skip |  |  |
| `--starred <boolean>` | Filter by starred status |  |  |
| `--read <boolean>` | Filter by read status |  |  |
| `--tagged <boolean>` | Filter by tag presence |  |  |
| `--highlighted <boolean>` | Filter by highlight presence |  |  |
| `--word-count-min <number>` | Minimum word count |  |  |
| `--word-count-max <number>` | Maximum word count |  |  |
| `--added-after <timestamp>` | Only links added after this timestamp |  |  |
| `--added-before <timestamp>` | Only links added before this timestamp |  |  |
| `--read-after <timestamp>` | Only links read after this timestamp |  |  |
| `--read-before <timestamp>` | Only links read before this timestamp |  |  |
| `--sort <order>` | Result sort order |  | newestSaved, oldestSaved, newestRead, oldestRead, shortest, longest, titleA, titleZ |

### Inherited global options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-V, --version` | output the version number |  |  |
| `--base-url <url>` | GoodLinks API base URL | `"http://localhost:9428/api/v1"` |  |
| `--token <token>` | GoodLinks API bearer token |  |  |

Search highlights

**Usage:** `goodlinks highlights search [options]`

Find or remove links with identical URLs

**Usage:** `goodlinks dedupe [options]`

### Options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--delete` | Delete newer copies, keeping the oldest |  |  |
| `--json` | Emit duplicate groups as JSON and make no changes |  |  |

## `goodlinks dead-links`

Find and tag links that are unavailable

**Usage:** `goodlinks dead-links [options]`

### Options

| Option | Description | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--tag <tag>` | Check links with this tag |  |  |
| `--all` | Check every link |  |  |
| `--unread` | Check only unread links |  |  |
| `--untagged` | Check only untagged links |  |  |
| `--timeout <seconds>` | HTTP timeout per URL | `30` |  |
| `--workers <number>` | Parallel HTTP probes | `10` |  |
| `--dry-run` | Report tags without updating links |  |  |
| `--json` | Emit results as JSON and make no changes |  |  |
